heading: Omitted
label: 544 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which assigned individual monetary credits from the capital reserve fund to members of the Klamath Tribes to be used for certain purposes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Mar. 29, 1948, ch. 160, § 262 Stat. 92
Short Title, , provided that , enacting sections 544 and 545 of this title, could be known as the Klamath Welfare Act.Act Mar. 29, 1948, ch. 160, § 162 Stat. 92act Mar. 29, 1948, ch. 160
